query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.neighborhood, e.instagram, e.image
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Boteco Moderno%'
AND e.id NOT IN (1923, 1720, 2094, 7712, 2086, 2048, 2481, 3080, 3018, 7715, 5164)
ORDER BY e.neighborhood, e.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.id, e.name, e.neighborhood, e.instagram, e.image
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Boteco Moderno%'
AND e.id NOT IN (1923, 1720, 2094, 7712, 2086, 2048, 2481, 3080, 3018, 7715, 5164)
ORDER BY e.neighborhood, e.name;
